claims.claim: Dynamic exploration noise should ease through the pressure room instead of snapping from settled stability into structural shock.
claims.evidence_plan: Link read-only smoothstep pressure-room review source and tests.

claims.claim: Lowering `VISCOUS_RHO_FLOOR` from 0.90 to 0.85 might reveal whether crowded stillness is comfort or cage, but it would alter live reservoir dynamics.
claims.evidence_plan: Promote as operator-gated live ESN/rho-floor change.

claims.claim: A live `DYNAMIC_NOISE_PRESSURE_SMOOTHING` or equivalent would require explicit approval because it changes exploration-noise runtime behavior.
claims.evidence_plan: Link existing read-only review and gate live wiring behind Mike/operator approval.
